characters.name: Harlan
characters.summary: A hooded human rogue/ranger who keeps emotional distance from the group, acts selflessly in danger, and is most at home in stealth, theft, and ranged opportunism.
goals: Find connection even though he does not know how to build it
hooks: His bond with Nighteyes is taboo beast magic
He grew up homeless and lacks family ties
He once had a father figure in the Vaelport thieves' guild
The Piebalds have the same power and may offer belonging
tensions: Fears Jin learning the truth most
Repeated danger to Nighteyes can force emotional honesty
continuity_notes: Least concerned about Dax learning the truth

characters.name: Dax
characters.summary: An intense dragonblood fighter who hides visible horns and scales, prefers direct confrontation, and is driven by the search for his missing father.
goals: Avoid rejection for what he is
hooks: He is destined to be a dragon rider
He bonded closely with Wyll from Zephiorion
tensions: People do not accept his dragonblood traits
Would be destabilized by proof his father is dead or his mother lives
continuity_notes: Sees Jin more as an uncle than a father
Would embrace dragon-rider destiny if confirmed

characters.name: Jin
characters.summary: A quiet, meditative human monk who serves as the party's moral center, follows Soryan as a chosen champion, and carries unresolved rage from a past life of slavery.
goals: Protect and guide the younger party members
Eventually strike against slavery in the south
hooks: Slavery remains a major future conflict
tensions: Carries anger the party has not fully seen
Will react strongly to slavery, abuse, or abduction
Two key decisions about party priorities remain unresolved
continuity_notes: Acts as a father figure to the group
Open questions remain around conflict between justice and party goals

characters.name: Marcel
characters.summary: An outgoing changeling bard who naturally takes center stage, wants belonging more than applause, and is tied to prophetic dreams, the mystery of the Catalyst, and a villainous maternal figure.
hooks: The party itself is the Catalyst
His mother is the campaign's larger antagonist
tensions: Fears his charisma is all an act
Does not really understand his changeling identity
Public embarrassment can break his confidence
continuity_notes: Would tell the party if he learned they were the Catalyst

secrets_and_clues.text: Harlan's bond with Nighteyes is taboo beast magic.
The Piebalds share Harlan's power and may become a source of belonging, danger, or instruction.
Dax's dragonblood lineage connects to extinct dragon keepers, and he is destined to become a dragon rider.
Jin has personally met Soryan and serves as Soryan's champion.
Jin's calm hides unresolved anger tied to his history of slavery.
The party itself is the Catalyst Marcel wants to understand.
Marcel's mother is the major antagonist pulling the strings.

campaign_state_notes: Party emotional cohesion is still limited.
Jin functions as the stabilizing center.
Marcel naturally occupies the visible leadership role.
Harlan and Dax both carry stigmatized or hidden identities.
Several campaign arcs are built around hidden truths becoming public.
